identity.name: Smoke Product
identity.tagline: A disposable identity for independent template verification.

home.title: Prove the template without product history.
home.description: This disposable identity verifies that configuration changes do not require platform edits.

login.title: Sign in to Smoke Product
login.description: Use only disposable local verification accounts.

account.title: Smoke account
account.description: Verify the neutral account and profile boundary.
